# Key Turn Realty Group

> Rami Rafeh is a retired U.S. Air Force veteran and San Antonio, Texas real estate agent — a licensed Texas REALTOR® (TREC License #724566) brokered by Real Broker, LLC, and a Military Relocation Professional (MRP). He helps veterans and first-time home buyers purchase with confidence, specializing in VA loans, new construction, and relocation across San Antonio and the Texas Hill Country. Free consultations.

## About

- [Key Turn Realty Group homepage](https://keyturnrealty.com/): Rami Rafeh's real estate practice. Covers who he serves (veterans, first-time buyers, relocating families), his background as an Air Force veteran, client testimonials, and a free buyer consultation booking.

## Services

- VA loan home purchases — guiding eligible veterans and service members through the VA loan process.
- First-time home buyer representation — education and step-by-step support for buyers new to the market.
- New construction — representing buyers purchasing newly built homes.
- Relocation — helping families moving to the San Antonio area.

## Areas served

San Antonio, Boerne, New Braunfels, Schertz, Cibolo, and Universal City, Texas, plus Bexar, Comal, Guadalupe, and Kendall counties.

## Resources

- [First-Time Home Buyer Handbook (PDF)](https://keyturnrealty.com/guides/first-time-home-buyer-handbook.pdf): Free guide covering the home-buying process for first-time buyers.
- [Consumer Protection Notice (PDF)](https://keyturnrealty.com/consumer-protection-notice.pdf): Texas Real Estate Commission consumer protection notice.
- [Information About Brokerage Services (PDF)](https://keyturnrealty.com/iabs.pdf): Texas IABS disclosure.
